log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 17] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 13] HIT! 22 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 37/59
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 13] HIT! 14 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 23/59
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 13] HIT! 20 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 3/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 3/59 | AC: 13
